JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF KLYCE, HARVEY ,AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOYENT, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED EVIDENCE RAISING TRIABLE ISSUES WHETHER: 1) THE OPTION AGREEMENT IS VALID AND ENFORCEABLE; 2) THE OPTION AGREEMENT SUPERSEDED THE INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT; AND 3) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ACCRUED FOR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PURPOSES LESS THAN FOUR YEARS BEFORE THE CASE WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and Defendant. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KIRK B. FREEMAN, TEL. NO. 398-1082 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JEFFREY J. LOKEY OF GREENBERG TRAURIG, TEL. NO. (650) 289-7890 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOYENT, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. Plaintiff presented evidence raising triable issues whether: 1) the Option Agreement is valid and enforceable; 2) the Option Agreement superseded the Independent Contractor Agreement; and 3) plaintiff's claims accrued for statute of limitations purposes less than four years before the case was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
